belier.intro: The Moon deepens through Pisces, now at the heart of its journey through your most private house, and the call to rest, to dream, and to dissolve unnecessary burdens becomes even more insistent. At 74% illumination, this waning gibbous Moon is shedding light methodically, releasing what is ready to go. Mercury retrograde in your domestic zone continues to stir childhood memories and long-held family narratives.
belier.love: Old patterns in how you love are especially visible now, not as sources of shame but as invitations to understand and gently revise. Allow a loved one to be imperfect today, and offer yourself the same grace without hesitation.
belier.work: The invisible work you are doing, processing, letting go, and clearing space, is genuinely productive even when it leaves no visible trace. Honor this Piscean form of labor as essential to everything that comes next.
belier.energy: Rest is not retreat today; it is strategy. The fire you conserve in this quiet interval will burn twice as bright once the Moon turns and the sky invites forward movement again.
belier.intuition: The dream-space carries particularly lucid messages at this Moon depth. Even daydreams and passing images deserve a moment of your attention; they are delivering a kind of interior news bulletin.
belier.mantra: What I release today creates space for what I deserve.
belier.author: Sibylle

taureau.intro: The Moon travels deeper through compassionate Pisces and your house of friendship, collective dreams, and social belonging, dissolving rigid expectations about what community is supposed to look like. The waning gibbous at 74% continues its work of release; in this zone of your chart, that may mean gently letting go of a connection that has outgrown its time. Mercury retrograde in your area of material values asks what you are truly gaining from your social circle.
taureau.love: A friend who has been quietly significant to you may step forward in an unexpected way today, or you may feel moved to reach out to someone you have been missing. Emotional honesty within friendship is its own form of love under this Piscean sky.
taureau.work: A group project or collaborative vision benefits from letting go of one component that is not quite working, making space for something more aligned. The courage to release is its own form of progress.
taureau.energy: Your energy flows best today when it serves a collectively felt purpose rather than a purely personal goal. Contributing to something larger than yourself replenishes rather than depletes you.
taureau.intuition: Your sense of what a community needs before it knows itself is heightened today. Trust your compassionate readings of group dynamics; they are more accurate than surface impressions suggest.
taureau.mantra: I release the connections that have run their course with gratitude.
taureau.author: Sibylle

gemeaux.intro: The Pisces Moon, now midway through your house of career and public reputation, brings a quality of spiritual questioning to your professional identity. At 74% illumination, this is a releasing phase; something about how you have been performing your professional self may be ready to dissolve into a truer, more authentic expression. Mercury retrograde in Cancer turns this question inward, asking what you have been carrying in your work that belongs, in fact, to the past.
gemeaux.love: The contrast between who you are at work and who you are at home feels especially charged today. Someone who loves you for your private self, not your public persona, feels like an extraordinary gift worth cherishing openly.
gemeaux.work: What is ready to be released from your career story? An outdated professional identity, a project that no longer aligns, or a goal that was someone else's dream wearing your name? The Pisces Moon is asking you to feel the answer rather than think it.
gemeaux.energy: Your mental agility slows today, and this is welcome. The clarity you have been seeking through analysis will arrive more completely through feeling and intentional stillness.
gemeaux.intuition: Your intuition today is a long, slow tide rather than a quick current. Do not rush the insight that is forming; let it arrive in its own time and it will be unmistakably true.
gemeaux.mantra: I release the role I have been playing and step into who I am.
gemeaux.author: Sibylle

cancer.intro: The Pisces Moon, now at 15 degrees in your house of philosophy and spiritual seeking, creates a deepening water trine with your own Cancer Sun, filling this day with a sense of expanded awareness and emotional wisdom. This is one of the most genuinely nourishing transits of the week for you, a confluence of feeling and understanding that rarely visits in such quiet abundance. Mercury retrograde in your own sign invites you to revisit a belief you have long held and ask whether it is truly yours.
cancer.love: The longing for a connection that transcends the ordinary is especially present today. Even the most practical relationship feels shot through with something larger and more mysterious under this sky. Share a moment of genuine wonder with someone you love.
cancer.work: Any work that serves the well-being of others or speaks to something larger than the purely transactional feels deeply supported. Your emotional intelligence is your most powerful professional asset under this Piscean influence.
cancer.energy: Your natural reserves are replenished by beauty, water, and meaningful conversation today. Fill your day with these, and what you give to others will flow from genuine abundance rather than depletion.
cancer.intuition: Your capacity for spiritual knowing is at a quiet peak today. You do not need a system or a teacher; the answers you are seeking are already present in the depth of your own emotional understanding.
cancer.mantra: I trust the wisdom that flows through my feeling heart.
cancer.author: Sibylle

lion.intro: The Pisces Moon, settled at 15 degrees in your house of transformation and shared intimate life, has moved from entry into deepening. The releasing quality of the 74% waning gibbous works through your psyche like a slow, purifying tide, washing away what has accumulated in the depths of your closest bonds. Mercury retrograde in Cancer continues to bring half-processed feelings to the surface.
lion.love: A depth of emotional reckoning is available in your closest relationship today, not as conflict but as clarifying honesty. The question being asked in the quiet space between you and a partner is this: what are we still carrying that we could put down together?
lion.work: Shared financial structures or creative partnerships benefit from a spirit of compassionate review today. Something in the underlying agreement may need to be renegotiated with more emotional intelligence than the original terms allowed.
lion.energy: Your vitality today comes from depth rather than speed. Slow, intentional movement and a willingness to sit with uncomfortable feelings are more restorative than surface-level distraction.
lion.intuition: The eighth house Pisces Moon gives you an almost telepathic awareness of what others are carrying beneath their presented selves. Use this sensitively and for the purpose of understanding, never advantage.
lion.mantra: I release what we no longer need to carry between us.
lion.author: Sibylle

vierge.intro: The Pisces Moon deepens through your relationship house, now at 15 degrees and still opposing your natal impulse toward precision and self-contained independence. Something about your understanding of partnership is slowly dissolving and reforming at a level beneath conscious thought. Mercury retrograde in Cancer adds an emotional, memory-laden quality to your encounters with significant others today.
vierge.love: The boundary between where you end and your partner begins feels unusually soft today, and this softness is a gift rather than a threat. Allow the merging rather than resisting it, and you may discover a dimension of intimacy that your usual self-sufficiency tends to keep at a careful distance.
vierge.work: A professional relationship calls for more listening than directing today. The colleague or client who feels truly heard by you will trust you with something genuinely valuable in return.
vierge.energy: Your energy is most sustainable in a mode of compassionate presence rather than efficient correction. Give yourself permission to move at a fully human pace today.
vierge.intuition: You are picking up on subtle relational cues with unusual accuracy. Rather than second-guessing these impressions, trust them as data from a perceptual system functioning just below your usual threshold of awareness.
vierge.mantra: I let another's truth move me without losing my own ground.
vierge.author: Sibylle

balance.intro: The Pisces Moon at 15 degrees fills your house of health, daily work, and service with a compassionate quality, softening the usual edges of efficiency and inviting you to feel the meaning in the work rather than merely assess its output. The waning gibbous phase is releasing something from your daily routines, perhaps a habit of self-criticism or an obligation that has outlived its value. Mercury retrograde in Cancer brings emotional awareness to your work environment.
balance.love: The way you show love through small, careful acts of service is particularly meaningful today. Offer this not only to others but to yourself, with the same attentiveness and tenderness you naturally give outward.
balance.work: The quality of your attention matters more than its quantity today. Deep, compassionate focus on one task at a time is far more productive under this Piscean sky than scattered, anxious multitasking.
balance.energy: Your nervous system is requesting a gentler rhythm today. Soft music, warm water, and unhurried movement are the antidotes to any tension the week has accumulated.
balance.intuition: Your body is your most articulate oracle today, translating the invisible emotional atmosphere around you into precise physical sensation. Learn to read these signals and you will have advance notice of almost everything important.
balance.mantra: I tend to myself with the same love I offer the world.
balance.author: Sibylle

scorpion.intro: The Pisces Moon at 15 degrees deepens through your house of creative expression, romance, and authentic pleasure, merging your already profound emotional nature with an oceanic inspiration that has few boundaries and no apologies. The 74% waning gibbous is releasing something from your relationship to joy, perhaps an old wound that convinced you that depth and delight were incompatible. Mercury retrograde in Cancer reaches back into your history of love and creative longing.
scorpion.love: A love from the past may visit your thoughts today, not as a haunting but as a reminder of the emotional register you know yourself to be capable of. Let this remembrance inform how fully you open to present-day love rather than close you off from it.
scorpion.work: Creative work today flows from a place that does not require permission or justification. The most powerful creative acts begin in a kind of beautiful irresponsibility; let yourself begin something for no reason other than that it calls to you.
scorpion.energy: You are replenished by beauty, emotional depth, and creative abandon today. Anything that produces genuine joy is, under this sky, also deeply productive.
scorpion.intuition: The fifth house Pisces Moon gives your creativity a psychic dimension today. What you make or imagine contains intelligence that exceeds what your rational mind has consciously assembled.
scorpion.mantra: My creative joy is a form of spiritual practice.
scorpion.author: Sibylle

sagittaire.intro: The Pisces Moon, now settled at 15 degrees in the very bottom of your chart, the root system of your psyche, brings a depth of emotional and ancestral awareness that your seeking spirit rarely pauses long enough to receive. The waning gibbous at 74% is releasing something from your understanding of home, safety, and belonging. Mercury retrograde in your house of hidden depths amplifies this quiet, interior excavation.
sagittaire.love: Those you consider your truest family, whether biological or chosen, feel particularly close today. A vulnerability you have been holding back, about your needs, your fears, or your longing for a particular kind of love, is ready to be gently spoken aloud.
sagittaire.work: Your professional drive is underpinned today by a deeper question: is the life I am building one I would actually want to come home to? This is not an idle tangent but a practical orienting question worth sitting with.
sagittaire.energy: The fire that usually propels you outward is, for now, warming the home fire. Let it. The inner life you tend today will fuel future adventures with more authentic drive.
sagittaire.intuition: Ancestral memory and the wisdom of your own deepest past are accessible today as intuitive knowing. A repetitive feeling or a significant dream from the recent nights is delivering a message worth sitting with rather than dismissing.
sagittaire.mantra: The home I build within myself is where all my journeys begin.
sagittaire.author: Sibylle

capricorne.intro: The Pisces Moon at 15 degrees continues to move through your house of communication and everyday thought, infusing your typically structured mind with a poetic and compassionate quality. The 74% waning illumination is releasing something from the way you have been speaking and thinking, perhaps an overly critical inner voice or an obligation to always have the most definitive answer. Mercury retrograde in Cancer deepens the emotional resonance of every exchange.
capricorne.love: A conversation you have been postponing because it requires emotional courage may find its natural moment today. The Piscean atmosphere makes vulnerability feel safer and more natural than usual; use this to say the tender thing you have been holding back.
capricorne.work: Your communications today carry more emotional intelligence than usual. This is a superpower in situations that require understanding human motivation beyond what is written in any brief or report.
capricorne.energy: Your mental stamina is well-served today by pausing more often than your usual self-discipline would typically suggest. The thinking that happens in the quiet intervals is the clearest thinking of all.
capricorne.intuition: Your intuition today speaks through language itself, through the word that rises unexpectedly, the phrase that returns to you, and the conversation that feels larger than its surface subject.
capricorne.mantra: I speak from my heart and trust that truth is always enough.
capricorne.author: Sibylle

verseau.intro: The Pisces Moon, now deeper at 15 degrees in your house of resources and personal values, continues to soften and dissolve your usual intellectual distance from questions of material security. Pluto retrograding through your own sign adds a subterranean intensity to this self-assessment of worth and abundance. Mercury retrograde in Cancer colors the picture with emotions and memories you may have thought were already fully processed.
verseau.love: Your sense of being enough, of having enough and being worthy of what you desire, directly influences the quality of love you are able to receive today. This is not an abstract philosophical matter but an immediate, felt reality.
verseau.work: A financial or resource-related situation is calling for an intuitive rather than a purely rational response. Something about the underlying value structure of a professional arrangement may need to be renegotiated at a feeling level first, before the analytical details can follow.
verseau.energy: The 74% waning Moon invites a quiet audit: where are your energy reserves going, and are the returns genuinely worth the investment? This is a practical question dressed in spiritual clothing.
verseau.intuition: Your instinct about what you are truly worth, not what you have been told, is speaking clearly today. The sense of value that arrives in a quiet moment is almost certainly closer to the truth than what you usually accept.
verseau.mantra: I am willing to receive what I have long deserved.
verseau.author: Sibylle

poissons.intro: The Moon rests now at 15 degrees in your own sign, moved from the threshold of entry to the fullness of itself, and you are enveloped in a quality of knowing that transcends ordinary analytical thought. The waning gibbous at 74% is releasing something from your self-presentation or your identity, something you have been performing that is no longer authentic to who you are actually becoming. Mercury retrograde in Cancer opens the channels between your present self and your personal history.
poissons.love: Those who know you deeply understand today that you are moving through a process of quiet transformation. The love that supports this, that does not demand you to be finished or fixed, is the most precious thing you can receive right now.
poissons.work: Creative, intuitive, and healing work flows as naturally as breathing today. Any work that requires you to show up with your full emotional range, not just your functional competence, is perfectly matched to this energy.
poissons.energy: Your sensitivity is at its height under the Moon in your own sign. Honor this by choosing your environment and company with unusual care; the inputs you receive today become the substance of tomorrow's intuition.
poissons.intuition: You are, today, the instrument through which the cosmos speaks. What you hear in the quiet is not imagination; it is the most accurate information available to you. Trust it completely.
poissons.mantra: I am becoming more fully myself with every tide that passes.
poissons.author: Sibylle
